ogTitle: Mulgrave vs Mullett Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mulgrave and Mullett Creek.
heading: Mulgrave vs Mullett Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulgrave, Queensland and Mullett Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulgrave has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Mullett Creek (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulgrave or Mullett Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulgrave has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Mullett Creek scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulgrave scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Mullett Creek scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulgrave or Mullett Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulgrave has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
